use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics on dashboards
Showing real-time statistics with trend indicators
Visualizing data changes over time with mini charts
Monitoring numerical KPIs with auto-refresh capability
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-compatible stats widget displaying metrics with a mini area chart. Features an auto-updating amount counter, percentage change indicator with directional arrows, and smooth SVG chart visualization. Designed for dashboard integration in analytics and monitoring contexts.
